hooks.name: entire-after-agent
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini after-agent'

hooks.name: entire-after-model
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini after-model'

hooks.name: entire-after-tool
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini after-tool'

hooks.name: entire-before-agent
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini before-agent'

hooks.name: entire-before-model
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini before-model'

hooks.name: entire-before-tool
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini before-tool'

hooks.name: entire-before-tool-selection
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini before-tool-selection'

hooks.name: entire-notification
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini notification'

hooks.name: entire-pre-compress
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini pre-compress'

hooks.name: entire-session-end-exit
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini session-end'

hooks.name: entire-session-end-logout
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini session-end'

hooks.name: entire-session-start
hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "%s\n" "{\"systemMessage\":\"Entire CLI is enabled but not installed or not on PATH. Installation guide: https://docs.entire.io/cli/installation#installation-methods\"}"; exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks gemini session-start'
